title: Project Youth+
html:
Project Youth+

Stub. Southern Oregon nonprofit (Grants Pass area, info@pyplus.org, 541-476-8146). Administers the +Account / IDA matched-savings program (5:1 match for education, vehicle, emergency savings) under the Oregon IDA Initiative. Yahir translated their application into Spanish — see 2025 12 05 ida translations.
